note: seq=63 (CT/SSL CHANNEL-1 INFLOW -- the real-time spine, finally deployed). The resilient multi-operator CT collector (atlas_ct_multilog.py) was staged but NEVER applied (the CT-era seqs 28/32/34 were rejected back when signing/guardrails were broken), which is why atlas-metrics shows zero ct_ssl rows and the prospect feed is all tier-3. This deploys it COMPLETE: live Google+Cloudflare log_list.json, drops retired Oak / readonly Mammoth/Sabre, keeps usable classic RFC-6962 logs (get-sth -> get-entries), parses X.509 SANs with cryptography (falls back to crt.sh/CertSpotter REST if cryptography is unavailable), and UPSERTs brand-new registrable domains into atlas.business tagged source=ct_ssl. PG-safe: CT_CAP=2000/run, idempotent, Nice=10. pip is TOLERANT (psycopg2-binary required; cryptography best-effort so a 3.14 wheel/Rust-build miss can't block the deploy -- the crt.sh backstop still produces rows). --selftest GATE (log-rotation + registered_domain + .gov/.mil suppression checks -- offline, PASSES). Installs a 5-min timer and kicks the first run NON-BLOCKING (CT fetch+parse can take minutes; must not wedge the 90s puller). After it lands, ct_ssl appears in atlas-metrics per_source and these same-day-new businesses become tier-1, hitting the FRONT of the 2-min brain-ranked feed. Allowlist-safe; live fleet untouched.

steps.note: seq=63: deploy resilient CT/SSL collector -> source=ct_ssl real-time inflow; 5-min timer; tier-1 feed.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS resilient multi-operator CT collector (fresh-SSL new-website signal, source=ct_ssl)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=CT_CAP=2000
Environment=CT_WINDOW=512
Environment=CT_ENABLE_TILED=0
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ct_multilog.py
TimeoutStartSec=20min

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS CT collector -- pull fresh new-SSL domains every 5 min (real-time channel-1)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=5min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-ct-multilog.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ct_multilog.py':'91c05ea8a36044f744e11d14c996df108c4ceca2ea97f419f2008e8c7738c3e7'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/pip install --quiet --disable-pip-version-check psycopg2-binary && { /opt/atlas/venv/bin/pip install --quiet --disable-pip-version-check cryptography || echo 'cryptography unavailable -> crt.sh backstop'; }

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-ct-multilog.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-ct-multilog.service']); print('CT collector kicked (non-blocking)')"
